_comment: Reference hook configuration. Merge these entries into your ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key. Replace HOME_DIR with your actual home directory path.

SessionStart.description: Reset fact-forcing gate tracker for clean session state

UserPromptSubmit.description: Detect vague prompts and inject forcing instruction for prompt-enrichment skill
H.4.1: on first prompt of session, inject pending self-improve queue if non-empty (closes the manual /self-improve loop)

PreToolUse.description: H.7.23.1: blocks ExitPlanMode if active plan is HETS-routed AND missing ## Pre-Approval Verification section. Forces /verify-plan to run first (codifies drift-note 40 auto-triggering). Bypass via SKIP_VERIFY_PLAN=1 env var.

GAP-C fix (bench harness 2026-05-20): deterministically invokes route-decide.js before every sub-agent spawn, logs the verdict to ~/.claude/checkpoints/route-decide-log.jsonl. Closes the workflow.md route-decide rule's instruction-following gap (text rule was consistently bypassed in headless). Always approves; visibility is the goal, not blocking.
Fact-forcing gate: must Read a file before Edit/Write — prevents hallucinated edits
Block modifications to linter/formatter config files — fix code, not configs
H.4.2: Block writes containing secret-shaped literals (Anthropic/Stripe/Slack/GitHub/AWS keys, JWT, *_KEY/*_SECRET assignments). Hook-layer enforcement of the security.md pre-commit checklist.
H.4.2: Block Write of skill/pattern .md files that lack YAML frontmatter (silently-broken skills are worse than visibly-broken ones).
H.8.2: Surface active ADRs whose files_affected include the file being edited; emits [ADR-DRIFT-CHECK] forcing instruction (Class 1 advisory). Bypass via SKIP_ADR_CHECK=1 env var.

PreCompact.description: Checkpoint context to file + instruct library session-snapshot save before compression

Stop.description: Warn about console.log statements in recently edited files
Auto-store [ENRICHED-PROMPT-START/END] blocks from response into prompt-patterns.json
After N responses, nudge user toward /self-improve (closes the session-end review loop)
